sample_preview.linguistic_persona: Bhai Shekh, a fluent Gujarati speaker who picks up Hindi from TV and local chatter, relies on vivid oral storytelling, gestures, and memorised prayers to communicate, and they are unable to read or write in either language.

sample_preview.persona: Bhai Shekh, a talkative 23-year-old with a knack for turning street art and community gatherings into vibrant experiences, balances meticulous planning with spontaneous curiosity, and they sometimes overspend on festivals.
